meanings.definition: cause to be agitated, excited, or roused
examples: The speaker charged up the crowd with his inflammatory remarks
This movie usually arouses the male audience

meanings.definition: stir the feelings, emotions, or peace of
examples: the civil war shook the country

meanings.definition: raise to a higher energy level

examples: he would become emotional over nothing at all
she was worked up about all the noise

meanings.definition: marked by uncontrolled excitement or emotion
examples: a crowd of delirious baseball fans

meanings.definition: (of e.g. a molecule) made reactive or more reactive
